mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project (org_id, name, description, owner_id, created_at) VALUES (#{orgId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{ownerId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.name AS owner_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task t WHERE t.project_id = p.id) AS task_count FROM project p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.owner_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.*, u.name AS owner_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task t WHERE t.project_id = p.id) AS task_count FROM project p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.owner_id = u.id WHERE p.org_id = #{orgId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE project SET name = #{name}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
